Journal.Title: Advances in health sciences education : theory and practice
Journal.ISOAbbreviation: Adv Health Sci Educ Theory Pract

Article.ArticleTitle: Beyond the curriculum: negotiating power and knowledge in informal trans health educational initiatives.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Gender Studies Program, Bar-Ilan University, Katz Building (604), Max and Anna Web st., Ramat Gan, 5290002, Israel. blusin@biu.ac.il.
Gender Studies Program, Bar-Ilan University, Katz Building (604), Max and Anna Web st., Ramat Gan, 5290002, Israel.

MedlineJournalInfo.MedlineTA: Adv Health Sci Educ Theory Pract

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics approval: Ethical approval was granted by Bar-Ilan University’s ethics committee. In addition, all participants provided written informed consent prior to completing the study. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.
